title: Install Rust Android cross-compilation targets
description:
Install the three Android Rust targets via rustup target add. No NDK needed for this step.

Algorithm:
1. rustup target add aarch64-linux-android
2. rustup target add armv7-linux-androideabi  
3. rustup target add x86_64-linux-android
4. Verify with rustup target list --installed | grep android

Acceptance: All 3 targets appear in rustup target list --installed.
acceptance_criteria: rustup target list --installed | grep -c android shows 3
close_reason: 3 Android Rust targets installed: aarch64, armv7, x86_64
